entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A highly cross-pollinated crop widely consumed in Asia and Africa, targeted for biofortification

entities.name: IRON DENSITY
entities.description: The concentration of iron (Fe) in the grain, targeted for genetic improvement

entities.name: ZINC DENSITY
entities.description: The concentration of zinc (Zn) in the grain, targeted for genetic improvement

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A health condition caused by micronutrient deficiencies, specifically iron and zinc

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the nutritional value of crops through genetic improvement

entities.name: OPEN-POLLINATED VARIETIES
entities.description: A type of cultivar in pearl millet used for intra-population improvement

entities.name: HYBRIDS
entities.description: A distinct cultivar type of pearl millet

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A region where pearl millet is widely consumed and micronutrient deficiency is severe

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region where pearl millet is widely consumed and micronutrient deficiency is severe

entities.name: INTRA-POPULATION IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: A genetic improvement approach used to increase trait density within a population

entities.name: FAST-TRACK SELECTION
entities.description: A selection approach used to accelerate the improvement of traits like iron density

entities.name: S1 PROGENIES
entities.description: The first generation of selfed offspring used to assess variability in traits

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, which remained unaffected by selection for iron density

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: General agricultural characteristics of the crop that remained unaffected by selection for iron density

entities.name: ESSENTIALLY-DERIVED VARIETIES
entities.description: Improved versions of cultivars that can be used for immediate cultivation

entities.name: PARENTAL LINES
entities.description: Lines used for the development of hybrids with elevated mineral densities

entities.name: FAST-TRACK BREEDING
entities.description: An essential breeding process to produce biofortified pipelines for nutritional security

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food
